data.content: Shipment complete. Committed 6 files to main (b8f494fe2a4c): src/app/beats/page.tsx, src/app/beats/use-beat-actions.ts, src/components/beat-table-mutations.tsx, src/components/filter-bar.tsx, and 2 new test files. Fixed a max-lines-per-function lint violation in filter-bar.tsx by extracting BulkActionButtons component. CI passed (job: ci ✓). Coverage annotations present but non-blocking.
